description: Letter from Farah b. Isma’il from Busir, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Dating: around 1053 (Gil). The writer returned from Dandir where he bought flax. He informs Nahray that he would not pay the sellers until he gets the flax. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #505) VMR
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Būṣīr. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
